labs.name: Assist Module Main Effect
labs.unlock: Improves the main effect of Assist Modules.

labs.name: Armor Effect Bans
labs.unlock: Unlocked Tier 10 wave 40. Enables the banning of specific armor effects when rerolling armor modules. Has 4 levels 4 for total bans.

labs.name: Cannon Effect Bans
labs.unlock: Unlocked Tier 10 wave 40. Enables the banning of specific cannon effects when rerolling cannon modules. Has 4 levels 4 for total bans.

labs.name: Common Drop Chance
labs.unlock:
Unlock Lab in Milestones at Tier 4 Wave 70. Increases the chance bosses drop common modules. Has 10 levels for a max increase of 1%.
Note the starting Common Drop Chance is 2%.

labs.name: Core Effect Bans
labs.unlock: Unlocked Tier 10 wave 40. Enables the banning of specific core effects when rerolling core modules. Has 7 levels 7 for total bans.

labs.name: Daily Mission Shards
labs.unlock: Unlock Lab in Milestones at tier 4 wave 70. Increases the Shards given by daily missions. Has 50 levels for an additional 50 extra shard for each mission.

labs.name: Generator Effect Bans
labs.unlock: Unlocked Tier 10 wave 40. Enables the banning of specific generator effects when rerolling generator modules. Has 3 levels 3 for total bans.

labs.name: Module Coin Cost
labs.unlock: Unlock [[Lab Upgrades|Lab]] in [[Milestones]] at tier 10 wave 40. Reduces the coins required to increase the level of a module. Has 30 levels for a 30% reduction to coin costs.

labs.name: Module Shard Cost
labs.unlock: Unlocked [[Lab Upgrades|Lab]] in [[Milestones]] at tier 10 wave 40. Reduces the shards required to increase the level of a module. Has 30 levels for a 30% reduction to shard costs.

labs.name: Rare Drop Chance
labs.unlock:
Unlock [[Lab Upgrades|Lab]] in [[Milestones]] at tier 10 wave 40. Increases the chance for bosses to drop rare modules. Has 10 levels for an additional 1% chance.
Note the starting Rare Drop Chance is 0.5%.

labs.name: Reroll Shards
labs.unlock: Unlock Lab in Milestones at tier 4 wave 70. Increase reroll shards dropped from bosses. Has 100 level for an increase of 100 reroll shards.

labs.name: Unmerge Module
labs.unlock: Unlock Lab in Milestones at tier 8 wave 20. Allows modules to be unmerged. Modules that required a duplicate epic+ to merge will provide the lower level module and the epic+. When any module could be used to merge to the new rarity, unmerging will convert the modules into shards of the unmerged type. Has 1 level.

labs.name: Shatter Shards
labs.unlock: Unlock Lab at in Milestones at tier 16 wave 40. Increases the amount of shards earned when shattering modules. There are 5 levels increasing shards earned by 20% per level for a total of increase of 100%.
